Hello SUPPLIER_NAME, Thank you for reaching out regarding this pickup request. We apologize for the frustration and are able to provide support with this issue. For assistance scheduling a FedEx pickup, please reach out to FedEx directly by calling 1-800-463-3399 and providing your shipper account number. If you do not have a shipper account set up, the link to the Wayfair Help Center below will guide you through the steps. You may also reach out to your local FedEx representative for assistance with pickup delays. Once the pickup is scheduled it will appear on Partner Home and you will not need to send Wayfair a shipping confirmation. If you need an address changed for your pickup please use the help center article below: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/1432 Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Thank you, [Agent Name]
